scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @voicerails/connection-layer && npm run build --workspace @voicerails/workflow-engine && npm run build --workspace @voicerails/sdk && npm run build --workspace @voicerails/node && npm run build --workspace @voicerails/react && npm run build --workspace voicerails-cli && npm run build --workspace @voicerails/control-plane && npm run build --workspace @voicerails/telephony-bridge && npm run build --workspace @voicerails/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @voicerails/connection-layer && npm run typecheck --workspace @voicerails/workflow-engine && npm run typecheck --workspace @voicerails/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @voicerails/node && npm run typecheck --workspace @voicerails/react && npm run typecheck --workspace voicerails-cli && npm run typecheck --workspace @voicerails/control-plane && npm run typecheck --workspace @voicerails/telephony-bridge && npm run typecheck --workspace @voicerails/dashboard
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build --workspace @voicerails/dashboard && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:bridge: gcloud run deploy voicerails-telephony-bridge --source platform/telephony-bridge --project voicerails8 --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated --quiet
